title: Chapter 12 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of polishing and publishing!

questions.question: Which widget would you use for an implicit animation of a color change?
questions.explanation: AnimatedContainer animates changes to its properties, including color.

questions.question: Implicit animations require an AnimationController.
questions.explanation: They handle the animation automatically without a controller.

questions.question: In explicit animations, the _____ controls the timing and playback.
questions.explanation: AnimationController is the heart of explicit animations.

questions.question: What must you always do with an AnimationController?
questions.explanation: Dispose to prevent memory leaks.

questions.question: The Tween class defines the range of values for an animation.
questions.explanation: Yes, e.g., Tween<double>(begin: 0, end: 1).

questions.question: Which method in CustomPainter actually draws on the canvas?
questions.explanation: The paint method receives the Canvas.

questions.question: To avoid unnecessary repaints, override _____ to return false if nothing changed.
questions.explanation: shouldRepaint tells Flutter if the painter needs to run again.

questions.question: Using const constructors can improve performance.
questions.explanation: Const widgets are canonicalized and reused.

questions.question: Which ListView constructor is best for long lists?
questions.explanation: ListView.builder builds items on demand.

questions.question: To build an Android app bundle for release, use `flutter build _____`.
questions.explanation: flutter build appbundle generates an .aab file.

questions.question: You need a keystore to sign an Android app for release.
questions.explanation: All Android apps must be signed.

questions.question: What is the purpose of `flutter_launcher_icons`?
options: To generate app icons for all platforms
questions.explanation: It generates launcher icons easily.

questions.question: In iOS, you archive the app using _____.
questions.explanation: You build with flutter, then archive in Xcode.

questions.question: RepaintBoundary can help improve performance by isolating repaints.
questions.explanation: It prevents parts of the UI from repainting unnecessarily.

questions.question: What does the `curve` parameter in AnimatedContainer do?
options: Defines the timing curve (ease, bounce, etc.)
questions.explanation: Curve defines how the animation progresses over time.

questions.question: The _____ package helps add a splash screen to your Flutter app.
questions.explanation: It generates native splash screens.

questions.question: CustomPaint can only draw rectangles and circles.
questions.explanation: You can draw any shape using Canvas methods.

questions.question: Which tool helps profile Flutter app performance?
questions.explanation: All can be used, but Flutter DevTools is Flutter-specific.

questions.question: To run a performance check on your app, use `flutter run --_____`.
questions.explanation: Profile mode gives performance metrics.

questions.question: AnimatedBuilder is used to rebuild a widget tree during an animation.
questions.explanation: It listens to an animation and rebuilds efficiently.

questions.question: What is the difference between AnimatedContainer and Container?
questions.explanation: AnimatedContainer automatically animates when its properties change.

questions.question: On Android, the file generated by `flutter build appbundle` has extension _____.
questions.explanation: Android App Bundle files have .aab extension.

questions.question: You can test your release build locally before publishing.
questions.explanation: Use `flutter run --release` to test the release version.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a performance tip?
questions.explanation: Keys can actually help preserve state; avoiding them is not a performance tip.

questions.question: To add a dependency in pubspec.yaml, you add it under the _____ section.
questions.explanation: Runtime dependencies go under dependencies.
